items.caption: The official seal of the town of chester. the seal features a stylized green tree with a circular arrangement of berries, encircled by the text "chester connecticut" in a serif font. the year "1629" is prominently displayed at the bottom of the tree, indicating the town's founding year. the seal has a white background with a green border, and there are two small green animals, possibly squirrels, at the top corners. the overall design is emblematic of the town's heritage and identity.
